parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS anzahl, COALESCE(JSON_AGG(JSON_BUILD_OBJECT('id', id, 'titel', titel, 'plz', plz, 'gemeinde_landkreis', gemeinde_landkreis, 'preis', preis, 'preis_pro_m2', preis_pro_m2, 'quelle', quelle, 'url_offiziell', url_offiziell) ORDER BY created_at DESC), '[]'::json) AS listings FROM listings WHERE exported_at IS NULL AND source IN ('isenbuettel', 'meinersen', 'wesendorf', 'lachendorf', 'lehre', 'papenteich')
